cluster.description: Cluster name. Required when placement_mode is auto_local.

additional_disks.description: Additional data disk sizes in GiB. Disks are created on the selected datastore.

placement_mode.description: Placement mode. Omit or use explicit to preserve the legacy direct datastore/resource pool placement.

placement_strategy.description: Host/datastore scoring strategy used when placement_mode is auto_local.

spread_group.description: Optional host spread group identifier. Use a unique value per cluster/role when the same machine class can be reused by multiple clusters.

host_anti_affinity.description: Optional host anti-affinity policy for placement_mode=auto_local. preferred avoids hosts already used by the same spread_group when possible, required rejects them.

host_selector.description: Filters candidate ESXi hosts when placement_mode is auto_local.

name_regex.description: Optional regular expression to match host names.

require_connected.description: When true or omitted, only connected hosts are considered.

exclude_maintenance.description: When true or omitted, hosts in maintenance mode are excluded.

local_datastore_selector.description: Filters candidate local datastores when placement_mode is auto_local.

name_regex.description: Optional regular expression to match local datastore names.

min_free_space_gib.description: Additional free space to keep on the selected datastore after placement, in GiB.

balanced_weights.description: Optional weights for placement_strategy=balanced. Weights are normalized automatically.

template.description: VM template name to clone from

folder.description: VM folder path (optional, defaults to datacenter VM folder)

ca_cert.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate(s) to trust on the machine. Provide the full certificate block including BEGIN/END lines. Multiple certificates can be concatenated.
